title: Hello
summary: This is my personal blog. I'll be using it to share my thoughts on technology, programming, and other topics.

title: Building a local, portable AI cluster
summary: One of my favoirte recent project was building a local AI cluster. I was able to orchestrate models across 3 separate machines in real-time!  It took about 2 days to tie the system together but the result is something I'm very proud of.  One of the machines emits a wifi signal so the system can be used w/out internet connection and run on battery power.
